synopsis: As an Imperial Star Destroyer enters the Andelm system, Chewbacca and Zarro press ahead with a scheme to smuggle an explosive-packed repair droid aboard Jaum's shipment. Sevox lends them his bunker as a hideout, and the pair infiltrate the locked-down spaceport disguised as a battle droid and a small alien, bluffing their way in by passing Chewbacca off as Jaum's newest war droid. In the hangar they find Jaum overseeing stormtroopers loading crates of Andelm beetles onto an Imperial landing craft guarded by an AT-ST. When Jaum grows suspicious, Chewbacca opens fire, and Zarro slips the rigged droid "Boomer" aboard the shuttle. Tyvak challenges the Wookiee to a brawl, but Chewbacca activates an engine that burns the Shistavanen alive and topples the walker. Jaum escapes on the shuttle believing he has won, unaware the sabotage droid is aboard. Zarro and Chewbacca's celebration is cut short when scout trooper reinforcements arrest them on Commander Kai's orders and haul them off for interrogation.
title: Chewbacca (2015) Part IV
